description: You are a residential architect commissioned to design a second-story addition for the Contemporary House to accommodate a growing family. Design a distinct second floor above the existing footprint containing at least two rooms and one window, connected to the ground floor by a staircase. Export the 2D ground floor plan to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ground_floor_plan.jpg, the 2D second floor plan to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\second_floor_plan.jpg, and a 3D exterior perspective of the complete structure to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\two_story_exterior.jpg. Save the project to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\two_story_design.dpn.
